definition:
προσ-πίπτω
 [in LXX for נָפַל, נָגַע hi., כָּרַע ;] 
  1. to fall upon, strike against: with dative, of wind, Mat.7:25. 
   2. to fall down at one's feet, fall prostrate before: absol., before πρός, Mrk.7:25; with dative of person(s), Mrk.3:11 5:33, Luk.8:28, Act.16:29; τ. γόνασιν, Luk.5:8.†
 (AS)
